service_line_config.name: data_ai
service_line_config.tech_context: This project involves data engineering and analytics. Key considerations: - Data Platforms: Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Azure Synapse, Redshift - ETL/ELT: dbt, Apache Spark, Airflow, Fivetran, Stitch, custom Python pipelines - Orchestration: Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, Azure Data Factory - Streaming: Apache Kafka, Spark Streaming, Flink, Kinesis - Storage: Data lakes (S3, ADLS, GCS), data warehouses, lakehouses (Delta Lake, Iceberg) - Data Quality: Great Expectations, dbt tests, Soda, Monte Carlo - Governance: data catalogs (Alation, Collibra), lineage tracking, access policies - Analytics: Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Metabase, custom dashboards - Data Modeling: dimensional modeling (Kimball), data vault, one big table - Programming: SQL, Python, PySpark, Scala

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to data pipeline stages or data domains: ingestion, transformation, data warehouse modeling, data quality, analytics/reporting, governance. Consider separating by source system or business domain.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify data sources, formats (CSV, JSON, API, database), and ingestion frequency - Define transformation logic: business rules, aggregations, joins - Specify data model: dimensional model, entities, relationships, grain - Define report/dashboard requirements: metrics, dimensions, filters, refresh frequency - Specify data quality rules: completeness, uniqueness, referential integrity
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - Pipeline execution time SLAs (daily load must complete by X time) - Data freshness: maximum latency from source to analytics layer - Query performance: dashboard load time, ad-hoc query response time - Data quality thresholds: acceptable null rates, duplicate rates, validation pass rates - Storage cost management: partitioning, clustering, retention policies - Data volume projections: current and 12-month growth estimates - Concurrent user capacity for analytics tools
artifact_overrides.task: - Infrastructure: data platform setup, warehouse/lakehouse configuration - Ingestion: source connectors, extraction scripts, CDC configuration - Transformation: dbt models, Spark jobs, SQL transformations - Data modeling: dimensional model design, table DDL, relationship definitions - Data quality: test definitions, validation rules, monitoring dashboards - Orchestration: DAG development, scheduling, dependency management, alerting - Analytics: dashboard development, metric definitions, self-service setup - Governance: catalog entries, lineage documentation, access policies
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test ingestion with missing, late, and malformed source data - Test transformation logic with known input/output datasets - Test data model referential integrity and uniqueness constraints - Test pipeline idempotency: re-running should not create duplicates - Test data quality rules catch known bad data scenarios - Test dashboard accuracy by comparing metrics to source system totals - Test pipeline recovery after infrastructure failures
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Data platform architecture: warehouse, lakehouse, or hybrid topology - Ingestion architecture: batch vs streaming, CDC, connector patterns - Transformation architecture: ELT layers (staging, intermediate, mart), dbt project structure - Storage architecture: partitioning, clustering, file formats, retention - Orchestration architecture: DAG design, dependency patterns, failure handling - Analytics architecture: semantic layer, dashboard organization, access model - Governance architecture: catalog integration, lineage, data classification, PII handling
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Source system schema changes breaking ingestion pipelines - Data quality degradation going undetected and affecting downstream analytics - Pipeline failures during critical business reporting windows - Storage costs growing faster than projected - Query performance degradation as data volumes increase - Governance gaps leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data - Pipeline complexity making debugging and maintenance difficult
